# AncestryDNA raw data download
# This file was generated for a SYNTHETIC test account — NOT real human DNA data.
# rsIDs are real; genotypes are randomly assigned for testing purposes only.
#
# Below is a sample AncestryDNA-format file. Note the two-allele column format
# differs from 23andMe's single concatenated genotype column.
#
rsid	chromosome	position	allele1	allele2
rs4477212	1	82154	A	A
rs3094315	1	752566	A	A
rs2905035	1	779322	G	G
rs2980300	1	828418	T	T
rs3748595	1	1018704	A	G
# BRCA1 region (chr17)
rs1799950	17	41209079	A	G
rs16942	17	41223094	A	A
rs799917	17	41228504	A	G
rs1799966	17	41234451	G	G
# BRCA2 region (chr13)
rs4987117	13	32314943	C	C
rs1801406	13	32340301	G	G
rs206076	13	32346826	A	C
rs1799944	13	32914440	A	G
# APOE (chr19) — Alzheimer's risk variant
rs429358	19	45411941	T	C
rs7412	19	45412079	C	C
# MTHFR (chr1)
rs1801133	1	11856378	A	G
rs1801131	1	11854476	T	T
# CYP2C19 (pharmacogenomics)
rs4244285	10	96541616	G	A
rs4986893	10	96540410	G	G
# Factor V Leiden

# HFE (hemochromatosis)

rs1799945	6	26091179	C	G
# SLCO1B1 (statin sensitivity)
